diagrams.title: 7-Layer OSI Model Stack
diagrams.description: Shows all 7 layers with their numbers, names, PDUs, and example protocols at each level
diagrams.purpose: Memorize layer order and associated protocols

diagrams.title: Encapsulation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how data is wrapped with headers at each layer going down and unwrapped at receiving side
diagrams.purpose: Understand how data is transformed through layers

diagrams.title: Layer Addresses and Devices
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between layers, addresses used (Port, IP, MAC), and devices operating at each layer
diagrams.purpose: Correlate addressing schemes and devices with layers

diagrams.title: OSI vs TCP/IP Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing mapping between 7-layer OSI and 4-layer TCP/IP models
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between reference and implementation models

visuals.title: The Osi Model
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the osi model
